packs.name: Slang English
packs.desc: Tiếng lóng Mỹ - Anh thông dụng — giao tiếp tự nhiên như người bản xứ

words.example: The party last night was lit!

words.vn: vĩ đại nhất mọi thời đại

words.vn: nói xỏ, chê bai tế nhị

words.vn: ném mạnh, hoặc thốt lên phấn khích

packs.name: Idioms Essential
packs.desc: Thành ngữ thông dụng nhất — nâng cao khả năng diễn đạt tự nhiên

words.example: He told a joke to break the ice.

words.word: hit the nail on the head
words.example: You hit the nail on the head with that analysis.

words.word: cost an arm and a leg
words.example: The repair cost an arm and a leg.
I eat fast food once in a blue moon.
I'm feeling a bit under the weather today.
The exam was a piece of cake.
Come on, spill the beans! What happened?

words.word: let the cat out of the bag
words.ipa: /let ðə kæt aʊt əv ðə bæɡ/
words.example: I let the cat out of the bag about the party.

Don't cut corners on safety.
She always goes the extra mile for customers.

words.word: don't judge a book by its cover
words.ipa: /dəʊnt dʒʌdʒ ə bʊk baɪ ɪts ˈkʌvə/
words.vn: đừng đánh giá qua vẻ bề ngoài
words.example: He looks shy, but don't judge a book by its cover.

words.vn: có công mài sắt có ngày nên kim
words.example: Keep playing the piano. Practice makes perfect.

words.word: the ball is in your court
words.example: I've made my offer. Now the ball is in your court.
Let's call it a day and go home.
Stop beating around the bush and tell me the truth.
Working from home gives me the best of both worlds.
He fell between two stools and lost the deal.

words.vn: người nói ngược để tranh luận
words.example: Let me play devil's advocate for a moment.

words.vn: vấn đề hiển nhiên nhưng bị lờ đi
words.example: We need to address the elephant in the room.
I'm feeling under the weather, so I'll stay home.

words.word: get a taste of your own medicine
words.ipa: /ɡet ə teɪst əv jɔːr əʊn ˈmedsn/
words.vn: lãnh đủ như cách mình đối xử với người khác
words.example: He's always rude; now he got a taste of his own medicine.

words.word: give the benefit of the doubt
words.example: I'll give him the benefit of the doubt.

words.word: in the heat of the moment
words.example: I said it in the heat of the moment.

words.word: kill two birds with one stone
words.vn: một mũi tên trúng hai đích
words.example: I'll kill two birds by going to the store near work.

To make a long story short, we missed the flight.
He visits once in a blue moon.
Are you pulling my leg?

words.vn: cướp spotlight, làm lu mờ người khác
words.example: She announced her engagement at my wedding - she stole my thunder.
I heard it straight from the horse's mouth.

words.word: take it with a grain of salt
words.ipa: /teɪk ɪt wɪð ə ɡreɪn əv sɔːlt/
words.example: Take his advice with a grain of salt.
These problems are just the tip of the iceberg.
Our vacation plans are still up in the air.
Our argument is water under the bridge.
First my car broke, then I lost my job - when it rains it pours.

words.word: you can't have your cake and eat it too
words.ipa: /juː kɑːnt hæv jɔː keɪk ənd iːt ɪt tuː/
words.example: You want to save money but buy expensive clothes? You can't have your cake and eat it.
You look deep in thought. A penny for your thoughts?

words.vn: hành động có giá trị hơn lời nói
words.example: Don't promise, just do. Actions speak louder than words.
He forgot my birthday, and to add insult to injury, he didn't apologize.
The plan failed. It's back to the drawing board.

words.vn: sai địa chỉ, sai đối tượng
words.example: If you think I took your pen, you're barking up the wrong tree.
